fileUrl.description: URL of the file to import contacts from.

fileBody.description: Inline CSV data for contact import.

listIds.description: IDs of lists to add imported contacts to.

notifyUrl.description: URL to receive notification when the import completes.

newList.description: Create a new list and add imported contacts to it.

folderId.description: Folder ID for the new list.

emailBlacklist.description: Whether to blacklist imported contacts' email addresses.

smsBlacklist.description: Whether to blacklist imported contacts' phone numbers.

updateExistingContacts.description: Whether to update existing contacts during import.

emptyContactsAttributes.description: Whether to empty existing attributes not in the import file.
